fault_hypothesis: On line 53, when the counter exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of `cap`, causing the clamped value to be one less than the ceiling and oscillating on subsequent calls.

constraints.intent: After clamping, the counter must equal cap (not cap-1).
After the capping branch executes, the stored counter must equal cap exactly.

spec.expr: cap is None or counters__1[key__1] <= cap

constraints.intent: After the capping assignment, the counter must never exceed cap.
The returned value must never exceed the cap.
